# API keys

<!-- source: 03-set-up.qmd sections "Getting an API key {#sec-apikeys}" and
     "Ellmer set-up {#sec-ellmer}" -->

Getting a key from OpenRouter, Anthropic or OpenAI, and wiring it into your `.Renviron`.

::: {.callout-important title="Challenge" appearance="simple"}
TODO: challenge confirming ellmer picks up your key without hardcoding it anywhere.
:::
